name: deterministic-transient tests of the A=0.5 chimera collapse
description: Tests Avery's deterministic-transient hypothesis for the A=0.5 finite-N chimera: that the breathing trajectory spirals OUTWARD toward sync capture, so (1) per-cycle breath maxima M_k = k-th local max of min(R1,R2) ratchet upward monotonically within a run, and (2) the absorption lifetime t_abs is (near-)deterministically predicted by the collective initial condition, far beyond the manifold probe's null on D0. New code only; all prior results dirs are read-only. Peak detection reuses PR #41's canonical breath detector verbatim (tools/absorption-recampaign/breath.mjs detectPeaks); initial conditions are recomputed from the logged seed via seedChimera (zero integration). The A=0.2 persistent-run contrast requires re-tracing (those runs were never trace-dumped), done deterministically with the shipped-identical tracer.

model._note: beta/dt/sampleStride/t_max identical to absorption.config.json so any re-trace reproduces the published campaign labels bit-for-bit (the determinism gate).

boundary._note: Sync-capture boundary: min(R1,R2) sustained above theta for W seconds is a graze; the spiral-out hypothesis says M_k approaches theta from below. Used as the ceiling in the log(theta - M_k) spiral fit. theta == graze_criterion.theta from the campaign.

absorption_criterion._note: Labeler settings copied from absorption.config.json so re-traced t_graze/t_abs match the logged campaign (determinism gate).

breath._note: PR #41 breath detector defaults (breath.mjs BREATH_DEFAULTS); M_k are the detected peak heights of the smoothed pre-absorption min(R1,R2).

cp1._note: A=0.5 traces exist only for N in {8,16,32,64} (the phase subset). A=0.2 persistent runs were never trace-dumped, so >=40 right-censored (abs_censored) seeds per N are re-traced over the full t_max window. monotone_allowed_inversions: a run counts as 'ratcheting' if M_k is non-decreasing allowing this many single-step inversions (noise tolerance).

cp2._note: Per-N: Spearman rho for each single t=0 feature; k-fold CV R^2 of OLS on t=0 features alone; and (on the traced subset, where M1/Tb1 exist) k-fold CV R^2 adding the first-cycle features. Models are OLS with optional quadratic+interaction terms only (no model zoo). t=0 features come from seedChimera for every run; M1/Tb1 come from the existing A=0.5 traces (N in {8,16,32,64}).

benchmarks._note: The manifold probe's D0 Spearman |rho| <= ~0.15 across all (A,N) is the null the collective-IC R^2 must beat. Printed alongside CP2.
